titles.title: Support for Astrophysical Observatories and National High-Energy Astrophysics Hubs Act of 2026
Support for Astrophysical Observatories and National High-Energy Astrophysics Hubs Act of 2026
A bill to require the Administrator of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration to designate national high-energy astrophysics hubs.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
